---
title: ""
lightbox: true
---

<h1>

<center>Eisenhofer Photography</center>

</h1>

::: {layout-ncol="1"}
![Spectral skov III\
© 2026](images/home1.jpg){group="home"}

![Autumn's last leaves II\
© 2026](images/home2.jpg){group="home"}

![Spring ephemeral I\
© 2026](images/home3.jpg){group="home"}

![Kapiti gold\
© 2026](images/home4.jpg){group="home"}

![Sleeping wombat (*Lasiorhinus latifrons*)\
© 2026](images/home5.jpg){group="home"}

![Little black cormorant\
© 2026](images/home6.jpg){group="home"}

![Terrestrial alien\
© 2026](images/home7.jpg){group="home"}

![Shades of grey\
© 2026](images/home8.jpg){group="home"}
:::
